assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_034",
  "rule_id": "Verify Permissions on Backup gshadow File",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.98,
  "rationale": "The remediation only changes file permissions on a backup gshadow file to remove all access. This is a standard permission hardening step and does not affect system boot, networking, or authentication mechanisms that could lock out users.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "Potentially removes legitimate read/write access for scripts that might expect the backup file"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Run the provided chmod command as root",
    "Verify the file permissions after change",
    "Confirm no services depend on the backup file"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": false,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": "true"
}
